content: PaySuite (paysuite.co.mz) is a Mozambican payment gateway supporting M-Pesa, e-Mola, mKesh, and cards via a REST API at paysuite.tech/docs. Auth is Bearer token. POST /api/v1/payments creates a collection (deposit) with amount/reference/method/callback_url; webhooks fire payment.success/payment.failed with HMAC-SHA256 signature in X-Webhook-Signature header, retried up to 5x. GET /api/v1/payouts lists withdrawals. Flat 3% platform fee plus operator fee (~6% total for M-Pesa).
